CustomField.description: Campaign Event Nomination Household PRM Region
CustomField.formula: Case(TEXT( ND_Household__r.ucinn_ascendv2__PRM__r.ND_Group_Region__c ), '1','East', '2','Midwest', '3','West', '4','South', 'P','Principal Gift', 'G','Gift Planning', 'R','Programs', 'C','Corporate Relations', 'U','University Relations Exec', 'A','Annual Giving', 'T','Athletics', 'I','Global Advancement', 'D','Academic Advancement', 'X','None', 'F','Foundation Relations', 'E','Corporate/Foundation Relations', 'J','Central', 'K','East Coast', 'L','Illinois', 'N','Northwest', 'M','NY Metro', 'S','Southern', 'H','Southwest', 'O','Other', null )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Campaign Event Nomination Household PRM Region
CustomField.label: PRM Region
